<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Encoders; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\EncodedImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; class AutoEncoder extends MediaTypeEncoder { /** * {@inheritdoc} * * @see EncoderInterface::encode() */ public function encode(ImageInterface $image): EncodedImageInterface { return $image->encode( $this->encoderByMediaType( $image->origin()->mediaType() ) ); } }
